stemHtml: Regarding gravity-fed fuel systems, which statement correctly describes one of the design criteria for the installation of such a system?

options.a: A fuel pressure gauge is required in order to measure the pressure between the tanks and the engines.
options.b: The fuel tank(s) must be located above the carburettor(s) to provide the correct pressure to the engine(s).
options.c: Gravity fed fuel systems can not be used for fuel injected engines.
options.d: It needs an electric pump to operate.
